trivia_bullets.text: Fear of Lost Teeth is part of the DSK Fear-of cycle — a 14-card cohort of Enchantment Creature — Nightmare cards whose names all begin with 'Fear of...', each personifying a specific phobia as an embodied, stalking creature. The cycle spans all five colors. Fear of Lost Teeth is the cycle's black common rendering of odontophobia. [Scryfall: type_line 'Enchantment Creature — Nightmare', set Duskmourn: House of Horror]

At {B} for a 1/1, Fear of Lost Teeth is among the most efficient death-trigger engines in Pauper. Its on-death ability (1 damage to any target, gain 1 life) synergizes with mono-black sacrifice and enchantment archetypes in the format. EDHREC data shows inclusion in approximately 8,903 decks, with an EDHREC rank of 10,602 among all Commander-legal cards. [Scryfall: legalities pauper:legal; EDHREC: Fear of Lost Teeth card page, via WebSearch snippet]

Flavor text: "As it drew closer, Sam felt her own teeth wriggle in their sockets, as if they wanted to leap out and join the thing." The unnamed Sam is a survivor POV character recurring through DSK's flavor-text fiction, grounding the horror in a relatable human perspective against the House's monsters. [Scryfall: flavor_text field]

Art by Oriana Menendez, released 2024-09-27 as part of Duskmourn: House of Horror (set code DSK). Duskmourn was a horror-themed plane designed as a sentient house — the vision design team was led by Annie Sardelis. [Scryfall: artist, released_at; magic.wizards.com: Duskmourn House of Horror Vision Design Handoff Part 1]
